concerns.text: Task T031 implements quadratic regression but omits the Likelihood Ratio Test (LRT) required by plan.md 'Complexity Tracking' to resolve Gini/Gini² collinearity. The plan explicitly rejects VIF on these terms and mandates LRT; T031 must be updated to include LRT logic before T031 can be considered a valid producer for the non-linearity result.

Task T014 links bugs to modules, but no subsequent task calculates the 'Bug-File linkage rate' (SC-007) as a global aggregate percentage. The consumer (SC-007 reporting) has no producer task. A new task must be added in Phase 3 or 5 to aggregate and report this specific metric.

Tasks T032 and T033 perform sensitivity analysis sweeps but lack a specific sub-task to generate the comparative report/variance table required by FR-012 and FR-015 ('report how the count... varies'). The reporting step is missing, breaking the producer-consumer flow for the success criteria.

Task T027-T033 focus on Gini correlation. SC-006 requires 'Code churn correlation with bug density' to be measured and reported. No task exists to calculate the Spearman correlation between code churn (produced in T021) and bug density. This consumer requirement has no producer task.

Task T010 clones repos but does not explicitly enforce `--depth 1000` in its description, risking a default full clone which violates FR-001 and RAM constraints. The task description must explicitly state the depth parameter to ensure the producer (cloned data) meets the spec's constraints before downstream consumers (T012-T016) run.
